channel.title: AP News - US News
channel.description: Top US News stories from AP News

item.title: With North America’s largest commuter rail system shut down, NY governor begs unions to resume talks
item.description: New York’s governor is pleading with unions whose workers serve North America’s largest commuter rail system to return to the negotiating table, saying she’ll provide refreshments if they’ll work to end a 2-day-old strike.

item.title: Thousands flock to the National Mall in Washington for an America-themed prayer rally
On the voting rights trail, bus riders to Montgomery retrace old steps while fighting a new fight
